source_pr.title: executor: fix bug when do outer index join
source_pr.body:
This may cause panic and make result wrong.
PTAL @hanfei1991 @lamxTyler @shenli

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_INLJ(t, t1) */ * from t right join t1 on t.a=t1.a order by t.b").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil> <nil> 0 0", "3 1 3 4", "1 3 1 2", "1 3 1 3")) (executor/join_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_INLJ(t, t1) */ * from t right join t1 on t.a=t1.a order by t.b").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil> <nil> 0 0", "3 1 3 4", "1 3 1 2", "1 3 1 3")) (executor/join_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select /*+ TIDB_INLJ(t, t1) */ * from t right join t1 on t.a=t1.a order by t.b").Check(testkit.Rows("<nil> <nil> 0 0", "3 1 3 4", "1 3 1 2", "1 3 1 3")) (executor/join_test.go)
